description: Your SOC team suspects attackers are bypassing traditional alerting by embedding malicious payloads directly into extremely long requested URIs. Log in to Splunk at http://localhost:8000 (username 'admin', password 'SplunkAdmin1!') and create a Saved Report named 'URI_Length_Anomaly_Hunt' using web access logs from the 'tutorial' or 'web_logs' index. The report must aggregate the average and maximum lengths of the requested URI (uri or uri_path) per client IP (clientip or src_ip) and filter for instances where the average URI length is strictly greater than 60.
